affected_pattern: Specific customer segment (family plan primary lines) shows $0 while secondary lines are billed normally
root_cause: Family-plan splitter attributed the full plan charge to secondary lines and nothing to the primary — a recent refactor inverted the primary/secondary flag when computing the per-line allocation.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: Multi-Line Allocation Inversion pattern
Secondary lines show duplicated full charges (matching Duplicate-Charge pattern)
Commit 7a3f2bc in family-plan-splitter flipped the is_primary boolean
recommended_action: Revert commit 7a3f2bc and redeploy the splitter
Rerate the affected billing cycle and rebalance charges across lines
Issue adjustment invoices per affected family account
Add an invariant test: sum(allocations) == plan_total AND primary_share > 0
